description: A horizontal two-panel composite. The left panel shows a man with short dark hair and a bandage across his nose, wearing a blue Vans T-shirt, standing indoors in front of a wall sign. A red banner in the lower left corner reads The Witch. The right panel shows a crowded prison interior with rows of shirtless men, many heavily tattooed including large MS and other gang lettering across their chests, standing and seated on tiered bunks.
